name: io.github.brunovicco/openfinance-br-mcp
description: MCP server for Open Finance Brasil - accounts, balances, PIX, and investments across 10 banks

environmentVariables.name: ENVIRONMENT
environmentVariables.description: 'mock' (default, no credentials needed - runs entirely in-memory), 'sandbox', or 'production'

environmentVariables.name: CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Client ID registered with the participating institution. Required unless ENVIRONMENT=mock

environmentVariables.name: CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Client secret corresponding to CLIENT_ID. Required unless ENVIRONMENT=mock

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Required only when calling list_transactions with categorize=true (DSPy transaction categorization)
